chunks.text: The official TNEA Counselling Code for Mohamed Sathak A.J. College of Engineering (MSAJCE) is 1301. The college is officially accredited by NAAC with an 'A+' Grade, which is a testament to its high academic standards and quality infrastructure.
For direct admissions and enquiries, visit the official portal: https://enrollonline.co.in/Registration/Apply/MSAJCE. For fee payments, use: https://www.feepayr.com/.
